_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular analyses refine classification of gliomas arising in patients with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: NF1-associated gliomas in the molecular high-grade group often had increased cellular density, higher Ki-67 labeling indices, and loss of p16 and/or ATRX expression on immunohistochemical evaluation
details: NF1-associated gliomas in the molecular high-grade group often had higher Ki-67 labeling indices compared to the molecular low-grade group
